title: Read static timing reports systematically
description: Work from the worst-slack paths through clock relationships and exceptions to find the true cause of a violation.
body: Use when a design fails timing and the cause is not obvious. Do not fix the first reported path blindly, since many violations share a common root such as a missing constraint. Actions: open the worst-slack paths, inspect the launch and capture clock relationship, and check for missing constraints or wrong exceptions. Validation signals include a root cause identified across grouped violations and slack improving after addressing it. Risk boundary: chasing symptoms instead of the root constraint wastes iterations, so escalate to a constraint audit when many unrelated paths fail together.
